stream_a.description: Targeted ML-specialist organizations with established, focused repository portfolios.
stream_a.filters: 50+ stars, regex doc exclusions, no language gate

stream_b.description: Targeted large general-purpose organizations with significant ML portfolios alongside non-ML work.
stream_b.filters: 500+ stars, regex doc exclusions, 5% execution language gate (Python, C++, C, Rust, Go, Mojo, CUDA), tag or language intersection check
